description: SKILL.md structure and core content -- manifest authoring guide with a complete, annotated example using stage geometry and slow_push_forward camera path. Document architecture (primary file with modular sub-files for geometry reference, camera reference, prompt templates). Per SC-04 (SKILL.md is self-sufficient for an LLM to produce valid manifests). Per Section 4.9.
notes: Tier 5 integration. High priority. Depends on stage geometry + push/pull cameras for the core annotated example. Spec complete after 4-round deliberation.
